dialoguesToLoad.text: Here you are! You must be Zack Farron, right? Your lieutenants told me what happened.
Lieutenants?
Yes, Sir. We have been explaining the situation.
We told him how the Caelum squadron forced us to retreat from the Prison Camp.
Right...
Allow me to introduce myself, Captain. I am the Commander Flokoff. I manage things in the Bridge Camp.
Nice to meet you, Commander, Sir. Did you just say we're near the Bridge ?
Absolutely, Captain Farron. This is the last line defense between us and Occidens.
Well, that is just great.
The commander rescued us, Captain. I offered him our services in return.
Our services?
That is right. Lieutenant Albarn and Lieutenant Magnus informed me of the situation and that your company specializes in Monster Slaying. Correct?
That is... Pretty much accurate. Sir. We're, like, a new company especially made for that.
Yes, That is what I was told. Truth is, Captain, the pluvials in the neighboring plains are becoming a threat.
Don't you have an army?
I do, but each man I remove from the front increases the chance of an Occidens breakthrough. We are already losing the war. I cannot do much more.
You are not the first one to tell me that.
Well, it is common knowledge that Occidens possesses weapons of great destruction made with forbidden technology.
Forbidden technology? What's that?
The youngest generation finally forgot... Before the Beast, the world was bustling with technological wonders, but it was these that brought the Cataclysm.
Now that you mention it...
But Occidens decided to unearth this technology. What can it bring other than ruin. That is the true reason behind our crusade. The safekeeping of the world.
Riiiiiiight... Anyway, we have work to do, don't we guys? I mean... Lieutenants. Let's bounce.
Best of luck in your endeavors.
Yeah, we'll be back. Probably.
